plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow YourWay to access your location to show your position on the map.

infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: YourWay uses your location to show your current position on the map.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: YourWay uses your location to provide navigation and nearby services.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: YourWay needs access to your location to show your position accurately.
